title: VGetPixelToRobot Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VGetPixelToRobot (Calibration As String, PixelX As Single, PixelY As Single, PixelU As Single, ByRef RobotX As Single, ByRef RobotY As Single, ByRef RobotU As Single)
parameters:
Calibration	String expression containing the name of a vision calibration in the current project.

PixelX	Real variable that will contain x coordinate in pixels.

PixelY	Real variable that will contain y coordinate in pixels.

PixelU	Real variable that will contain the angle in degrees.

RobotX	Real variable that will contain x coordinate in millimeters.

RobotY	Real variable that will contain y coordinate in millimeters.

RobotU	Real variable that will contain angle in degrees.
description: Retrieves robot world coordinates for the specified pixel coordinates.
examples:
Dim x As Single, y As Single, u As Single
Dim cal As String, seq As String

cal = "testCal"
seq = "testSeq"
m_spel.VRun(seq)
m_spel.VGetPixelToRobot(cal, 400, 300, 0, x, y, u)

float x, y, u;
string cal, seq;
